author: gruiggdnn
title: Problem with tags
content: It doesn’t display tags for half of my library (tags exist)

author: Dr. Tobias Fűnke
title: Controls not shown on Lock Screen
content:
I like the app. 
But I cannot get it to show the controls on my lock screen (iPhone 13 Mini @ iOS 17.5.1).

I have to unlock the phone, and go into the app in order to change tracks etc.

Hope this can be fixed. Or I’ll have to go back to the other music player I used to use.

author: Brilleaben
title: Awesome app
content: It is an awesome app. Currently synchronizing with a WebDAV server. It is a bit slow but it works. Also, awesome support!

author: kourosh8831
title: Really good
content:
I have been using it for a long time and it doesn’t have any problems 
Thx for this awesome app

author: dofalch
title: Worked great until recently
content: I was looking for an app that could play live albums without the annoying gaps between songs. Evermusic did the job until a recent update. Now there’s a fade out and fade in between songs that is as annoying as the breaks I wanted to avoid. A shame.

author: sehul098765
title: Last update s…
content: After the last update, the app don’t remember what was the last played file

author: Sean-in-Denmark
title: Nice!
content: I find this app really useful when working on new tracks of my own. Keep it up. 👍

author: iMulder
title: Cloud streaming
content: Fantastisk app - savner dog at få Pcloud til at virke med 2FA...

author: EricMasao
title: No Chromecast
content: Its useless without the option to cast music

author: laggymaclaglag
title: Core functionality half baked
content: Online folder scan very slow, even when using the highest read speed. The app is rescanning the entire library every time, which makes the media library (which is what you use for searching) practically unusable, if adding tracks to a large existing online library.

author: Sbnsen
title: God app
content: Bruger app’en til carplay. Vil dog kun starte op, hvis man går ind på iPhone først og vælger kunstner eller sang. Man kan ikke starte den op direkte på Carplay. Gør det lidt uhandy. Tror, dette må være generelt og ikke bare mit system...

author: PhillipSolbjerg
title: Been looking for something like this forever!
content:
Great, easy, cheap player for my Google Drive Music :)
Only 7 DKK and I got LOTS for it!
Keep up the good work guys!
